sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51406" key="i)/tuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἴτυξ</orth>, a bird, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἶδυξ</foreign>.</entryFree>
